CWE-89.reason: SQL injection is frequently exploited and often remotely reachable.

CWE-79.reason: XSS is common and often exploitable when reflected/stored in reachable endpoints.

CWE-22.reason: Path traversal commonly exposes sensitive local files.

CWE-918.reason: SSRF can expose cloud metadata and internal services.

CWE-798.reason: Hardcoded credentials are high impact when credentials are valid.

CWE-352.reason: CSRF exploitability depends on session and user interaction conditions.

log4j-core.reason: Known high-profile exploitation history for vulnerable Log4j versions.

django.reason: Exploitability depends on version and application configuration.
